name: Crab Cakes Maryland
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chopped fresh parsley, dry mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and Louisiana hot sauce with the beaten eggs and mayonnaise.
2. Add the cooked crab and cracker crumbs to the mixture, seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Divide the mixture into 8 portions and dredge each in flour.
4. Deep fry at 375°F to 380°F for 2-3 minutes, or until golden brown. Alternatively, pan fry on both sides in butter.
